# MindGenie AI

> MindGenie AI is a free, browser-based character guessing game. Think of any character — from movies, TV, anime, books, video games, or history — and the AI Genie asks a short series of yes-or-no style questions to guess who you're thinking of.

## Key facts
- Free to play, no account or signup required
- Runs entirely in the browser, works on desktop and mobile
- Typically asks 10–20 questions per round
- Covers characters from movies, TV, anime, video games, books, and history

## Pages
- [Home / Play](https://mindgenieai.xyz/): The game itself, plus FAQ, About, and How to Play sections
- [About](https://mindgenieai.xyz/about.html): Background on the project
- [Contact](https://mindgenieai.xyz/contact.html): How to reach the site owner
- [Privacy Policy](https://mindgenieai.xyz/privacy-policy.html): Data collection, analytics, and advertising disclosures
- [Terms of Service](https://mindgenieai.xyz/terms.html): Terms of use
